pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in export_result.sh and task.json instructions
Verifier script requires the string 'phoenix' to be in the rocket name element.
Verifier script implements exact +/- 20% ranges for every geometric dimension checked.

privileged_info_summary: The task asks the agent to create a synthetic model rocket named 'Phoenix Scout' from scratch. Verification scripts confirm the output is expected at '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/phoenix_scout.ork', the rocket name string must contain 'Phoenix', and all geometric constraints are scored with an exact 20% (0.2) tolerance margin.
